particulars.description: The cock public house,church lane, sarratt,hertfordshire. The company also charged by way of specific charge the goodwill and connection of the business or businesses from time to time carried on by or for the account of the company upon all or any part of the mortgaged property and the benefit of all licences (if any) held in connection. The company also charged by way of floating security all moveable plant machinery implements furniture equipment and stock-in-trade work-in-progress and other chattels of the company at any time placed on or used in or about the mortgaged property.. See the mortgage charge document for full details.
